Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to provide a DuckDB SQL query that filters out cases with more than 6 events returning only events from cases with 6 or fewer events

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants a single query Probably using a subquery or CTE to count events per case then filter

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ensure we include all columns from event_log

Name: Validation - PE
Text: SELECT FROM event_log WHERE case_id IN SELECT case_id FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id HAVING COUNT 6

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Thats the straightforward answer Could also use window function but IN is fine
